channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: PYPL merger edition 1 — 82 replies — 328.0/hr

Open thread • Replies: 82 • Updated: 2026-03-02 11:14 UTC

OP

Here we go!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61902172
I bought this shit at $52 like an idiot. I don't want a merger or a buy out. I want them to get their shit together and expand. They own venmo, the need to capitalize on that and take over the little fish with buyer protection.

61902704
>>61891943
What I am going to own Game Stop stock?!

61903001

61903514

61904108

61904711

OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

61904727
>>61891742

I don't think so, only because they claimed they didn't have any big acquisitions planned for the rest of the year

we are fucked

61909693

61909824

61910124

61916113

61919240

61919338
>>61892826
>$300
impressive

the CEO will get his big cut only at $83 dollar share price MINIMUM.
look at warner bros that shit went from below $10 to now beeing baught at $30

item.title: Dominos are falling — 23 replies — 92.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Dominos are falling

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-03-02 11:15 UTC

OP

Iran is blowing up oil refineries in the UAE as we speak.

Early replies (first 3)

61923034
Oil price go up: I stack.
Oil price go down: I stack.
AMA.

61923035
Two words

61923036
>>61923033
>IQ 276
Wow, I have to follow his trades, NOWW!!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923040
Another oil nothing burger

61923047
>>61923033
This person does not know what rate hikes are lmao. The FED does not hike rates due to inflation from commodity supply issues. Rate hikes are used to cool an overheated economy, in this case the economy is already slowed plenty and hiking rates is the exact opposite of what's in the playbook right now.

61923050
>>61923047
FED doesn't cut into an oil shock either

61923058
>>61923047
it's literally not a real person, it's an AI bot account that is using an AI likeness of Younghoon Kim, the world record IQ holder, to shill XRP and other bullshit

61923070
Sum Dum Fook has spoken

61923076
Biggest oil refinery in the world hit in the UAE(Aramco). Flames go up, price go up.

61923081
>>61923076

61923083
>>61923070
I wonder if he's related to Sum Ting Wong?

61923090
>>61923033
Nothing ever happens

61923101
>>61923033
>step 10
please god i have 40k usdc on hyperliquid ready to buy, that would be 2btc

61923110
>>61923076
>llOW DOBN

61923124
>>61923034
Stack what?

61923127
>>61923033
A flash crash just flew over my house!

61923129
>>61923076
>>61923081

61923181
>>61923033
I'm not investing in oil, too many other countries which can scale up production to compensate for these losses.

61923256
>>61923124
that's a codeword for he lets black men lay ontop of his wife

61923261
>>61923033
Easiest scam ever to pull off on the internet is put "IQ: 375" and theres a subsection of ultra retards who will become cult followers

61923304
>>61923033
why would the FED do rate hikes this is stupid

61923316
>>61923304
To make the situation worse obviously

61923344
More like 27.6

item.title: >At a $1.75 trillion market value, SpaceX would be bigger than all but five of the companies in the S&P 500 Index — Nvid… — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>At a $1.75 trillion market value, SpaceX would be bigger than all but five of the companies in the S&P 500 Index — Nvid…

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-02 11:21 UTC

OP

>At a $1.75 trillion market value, SpaceX would be bigger than all but five of the companies in the S&P 500 Index — Nvidia Corp. (NVDA), Apple Inc. (AAPL), Alphabet Inc (GOOG)., Microsoft Corp (MSFT). and Amazon.com Inc (AMZN). It would be larger by that metric than Meta Platforms Inc. (META), as well as Musk’s own Tesla Inc. (TSLA)

kek how overblown is this whole ponzi scheme stock market going to be. Why dont we just value a shell company = to the national debt and have the goyim pay up!?

Early replies (first 3)

61915412
>>61915399
Calm down! They cannot do this weekend sheningans forever, ai bs will implode on a nice sunny day, and this whole stonkniggershit will dump like a good ol solana niggercoin rug.

61915801
>>61915399
Who actually values spacex that high?

61915866
>>61915801
Everyone with a head on their shoulder. SpaceX already dominates the sky over the Earth and promises the galaxy. It unironically has greater potential than any company there is.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916016
>>61915866
Just to be clear, prior to January they had a monopoly in retrievable rockets. The chinese have caught up. To be specific LandSpace
(Blue Arrow Space Technology Co). Now its an arms race again between America and China. Both want an IPO this year.

>LandSpace Technology, a leading Chinese private space company, has advanced toward an IPO on Shanghai's STAR Market, with its application accepted on December 31, 2025, aiming to raise about 7.5 billion yuan ($1.07 billion

61916813
>>61915399
SpaceX is equivalent to the Railroads in late mid 19th century America.

61917587
>>61915866
>SpaceX already dominates the sky over the Earth and promises the galaxy. It unironically has greater potential than any company there is.
Not really, even in the West there are multiple competitors, Elon is a compulsive liar (just take a look at all the FSD promises) and there are no actual plans on how to capitalise on space.

61920786
>>61915399
>ey boys if the price was really high then it would be one of the highest in the whole world
>oooh my gaaaawwd, imaaagine
it should be illegal to make posts as stupid as this

61922627
>>61915399
This IPO is just so Elon can be the first trillionaire.

61922669
>>61915399
Hurry the fuck up and get your trillionaire title already, Elon

61923315
Why SpaceX is IPOing.

Elon needs exit liquidity. Why? Because the Earth's magnetic field is weakening. In fact, it's 150 years into what is known as a geomagnetic excursion, which is a 250-350 year long process from peak to trough to peak. And it is about to reach the tipping point where it really accelerates.

Weakened magnetic field = satellites more exposed to space radiation = satellite failures.

Look into reports about Starlink having intermittent failures over parts of South America, where the South American magnetic hole and South Atlantic anomaly is.

61923356
>>61923315

YESSSS more AI slop!!!! Thank you kind anon! Your opinion is really valuable!

item.title: Today is the day — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today is the day

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-02 11:21 UTC

OP

Lunar eclipse is today anons. Last solar eclipse Feb 17th was the local bottom. Full moon/lunar eclipse historically marks the crash day according to Puetz cycle.

BTC is going to crash. A lot of blood. Mercury retrograde just started, we're in the crash window until March 9th. Elliott Wave confirms 3rd of 3rd wave down on SPX which drags everything with it.

And now US/Israel vs Iran is actually popping off. Late Saturday night attack and counter-attack.

Every piece is falling into place at the same time — the astro, the technicals, the geopolitics. This isn't a coincidence.
Alts are getting absolutely destroyed. This isn't random volatility.

DYOR. Not financial advice.

Early replies (first 3)

61923231
>>61923226
Bring me 1500 eth or stfu already pls! Thank you for your attention to this matter!

61923232
>>61923226
Nice Schizo rant

61923238
>>61923231
>>61923232
You can pump this in a matter of hours. Tonight will be a day to remember. Everything has brought us to today. I just want to help all those perma bulls out there and their longs. The ones that listen to shitty youtubers and crypto influencers like Raol Paul, the granny from Ark Investors, etc.

I like /biz/ and just wanna help.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923274
>>61923238
We will see i approtiate your opinion but i dont believe in it.

61923329
Okay bobo

Just shorted 100x on chinkbase

61923339
>>61923329
I'm not a bear. I hold and stack 2 crypto assets. I'm shorting the rest. I'm just telling you because even if /biz/ has become a very slow board, I had a lot of fun with all of you in the past.

61923345
>>61923274
>approtiate

I also don’t believe your opinion, Rakesh

61923357
>>61923226
Thanks brother, but we know
This will be the bottom of the cycle, it began in early 2025
Next blood moon will be seen in 2028, every bull cycle came after a 12 to 18 months long blood moon period

61918166

Stay away from memecoins and bitcoin, 100% in ETH or XMR

61919535

61922628

>>61922577

61922632
>>61922577
..and your DNA seems to be prone to getting blacked whenever female. You merely accidentally was born with a penis.

61922643
>>61922577
You type like a beta "male"

61922668
>>61922643
It's okay asian women don't care about personality at all as long as you're not asian and have money they will literally fuck you no matter what

61922673
>>61922668
I'm not Asian and I don't have money

61922674
>>61922577
>talking to a bot/scammer
>posting said screenshot on 4chan thinking you are le ebin funny man

kys retard

61922675
>>61922577
Join her Telegram crypto trading group. These people have all the best trading tips.

61922678
>>61922673
Me too but I tried dating apps using the passport mode in asia once and got like 60 matches in a day all want to suck my cock I wish I can move there soon

61922680
>>61922577
quit dicking around with those creatures before you catch mongolian VD or get your kidneys stolen.

61922687
>>61922643
he types like a jeet (because he is a jeet)

61922697
>>61922577
Got some news Romeo, she is a scammer. Pig Butcher. Classic Scam. She is going to say that her parents are from Philiphines and she want a $200 dollars dinners. She will show her world tour and her parents photos and even call you. How do I know that? She tried scam me via Boo App. She will start to talk about crypto, biz and ask if you are interest in make some money in bitcoin using "signals". She will manipulate you to open an acc on OKX and them she will say ok fill up the acc and them send your bitcoins to that wallet on this website. The website is a fake scamming crypto site. Thats Pig Butchering. I confronted her and called her a Scammer. Show her profile pic.

61922705
She sounds like the scammer.

In scams specifically, it’s often part of:
>Urgency manipulation – “Act now or you’ll lose everything.”
>Scarcity tactic – “Only 5 minutes left.” / “Last chance.”
>Crisis scam – Pretending something serious happened and demands immediate action.
>Intimidation scam – Threats involving arrest, account closure, fines, etc.
>Social engineering – Psychological manipulation to rush you before you can think.

The goal is to trigger panic so you don’t pause, verify, or consult someone else. Real institutions (banks, government agencies, major companies) rarely demand instant payment or sensitive information under extreme time pressure.

Free pussy never means consequence free.

61922711
>>61922577
you're being scammed brother

61922783
>>61922705
I have nothing to loss, I don’t own nothing and be happy, what can he scam?

61922793
>>61922783
>What can he scam
You're an indian with 80 iq

61922815
Can’t even escape the miscegenation/race-bait threads on /biz/. It’s so over.

61922912
>>61922668
>as long as you're not asian
I live in an Asian country and every Asian girl here is with an Asian guy.
>>61922678
>I tried dating apps using the passport mode in asia once
So you've never been to asia
>and got like 60 matches
They are all hookers, scammers, trannies, skits and golddiggers. Normie trad girls don't use dating sites here

61923021
>>61922912
>I live in an Asian country and every Asian girl here is with an Asian guy
Because they haven't seen the BWC yet

61923097
>>61922585

Niggas really don't know what romance scammers are?

61923234
>>61922793

61923239
>>61923234

61923253
>>61923234
blanca too

61923309

61923325

item.title: HOLY SHIT /biz/ GET IN HERE — 12 replies — 48.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
HOLY SHIT /biz/ GET IN HERE

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-03-02 11:20 UTC

OP

TOWELHEADS WENT MAD
Some drones/missiles are now striking Saudi Aramcos Ras Tanura facility.

Ras Tanura is the single largest oil export terminal on the planet. It handles roughly 6.5 million barrels per day, nearly 7% of global oil supply flows through this one facility.

>>/pol/529614777

Early replies (first 3)

61923098
>>61923084
How does this affect the price of eth exactly?

61923108
>>61923098
It's only a matter of time until Trump forces rate cuts and money printing to get us through all the chaos that he's started. Some of that sweet liquidity will filter into ETH to shoot it past $10k. Just wait.

61923119
>>61923108
Kek

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61923121
AI

61923176
>>61923121
check Reuters or CNN or whatever reliable news you filthy coping kike

61923191
>>61923084
Maybe the world needs a break from oil for a few months.

61923192
>>61923121
lol

61923194
>>61923084
Why is oil not going up wtf?

61923210
>>61923194
why should it? no one needs oil because people are driving EVs now

61923222
markets didn't open yet, wait till burgers wake up

61923263
>>61923194
It will, markets need time to assess the impact on supply

61923353
>>61923194
Token not needed + infinite supply

61918948
>>61906370
Good thread. It's been a while since OP wasn't a faggot

61918968
>>61918416

It’s a cesspit now. Dont even look. Man I’m 46! Where did the time go.

>>61918968

61920123

61920179
>>61906449

winrar

61920392
>>61906370

61920744

nothing has been good since then

61921246

61921344
>>61906458
It still is. Ever seen that image of the Chinese kid with a boot on his head, then the next image shows that his arm was in the boot? That's you. You can take the boot off your head and laugh at anytime.

item.title: Buy alts now. Anything with fully diluted supply and reasonable history will suffice. It's quite clear at this point alt… — 3 replies — 3.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Buy alts now. Anything with fully diluted supply and reasonable history will suffice. It's quite clear at this point alt…

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-02 10:38 UTC

OP

Buy alts now. Anything with fully diluted supply and reasonable history will suffice.

It's quite clear at this point alts are doing an XRP of last run. Most have had their relatively shallow ~85% drawdown at this point and will continue to range from here with small pumps inbetween. BTC might drop to finish it's bottom later this year but alts will likely pump before that happens to respect the Feb26 bottom. You're looking at a mild spring/summer pump. The real pump won't be until late 2027/early 2028 (frontrun again, yes). Alts will most likely just follow a gradual path until that point with no real noteable price action so if you buy now you'll need to be patient.

Fud is extremely high and nobody is buying alts. Next run is likely to be alt centric.

Early replies (first 3)

61923244
>>61923233
$1 doge?

61923248
>>61923233
ive been on this godforsaken board for nearly 10y now, and on average, 1 out of 120 predictions seem to be close to 80%. so im gonna go out on a limb and call bs because you're just hopeposting for your own peace of mind, like most do

61923254
>>61923248
Then you should know when /biz/ is screaming alts are dead and it's the end of the world you should be buying (now).

All bottom indiciators are signaling I can't help you any more than that.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.
